results.owner_or_reason: breakdown/cli/plan.json story "Endpoint registry + Profile per-service hosts + ORVEX_URL/env model" (covers FR-CLI3) builds the per-service host registry per the tightened design (adopts canon flat hosts); residual host-form pinning is tracked separately as open decisions OQ-CLI2/OQ-CLI2b, not a missing build item.
breakdown/cli/plan.json story "421 cell-mismatch re-resolve path + tenant-to-cell registry read" (covers NFR-CLI5) directly implements the F-B disposition.
breakdown/cli/plan.json story "Cursor cell-qualification + events-host cold-start + ~6h reconcile + offline --cached" (covers FR-CLI14/NFR-CLI3/NFR-CLI5) directly implements the F-C disposition.

Governance/ADR-filing gap, not a CLI feature to build. Audit disposition is fixed-in-draft (ADR-triggers section added) + open-decision OQ-CLI9, explicitly gated on the still-nonexistent Act-1 ADR registry / Decision-Records parent; no build story exists or should exist for it yet (grep of feature-map.txt for ADR-registry/OQ-CLI9/Act-1 returns nothing).
breakdown/cli/plan.json story "admin namespace routing (reindex/reembed/events/user/workspace) per finding F-E" (covers FR-CLI5/FR-CLI11) explicitly cites F-E by id.

breakdown/cli/plan.json story "Service-aware transport chokepoint: envelopes, retry, correlation ID, Idempotency-Key" (covers FR-CLI11/NFR-CLI4) includes the Idempotency-Key guarantee that resolves F-F.

breakdown/cli/plan.json story "Service-aware transport chokepoint: envelopes, retry, correlation ID, Idempotency-Key" (covers FR-CLI11/NFR-CLI4) includes correlation-ID origination/propagation that resolves F-G.
